001package net.okocraft.box.api.feature;
002
003import org.bukkit.command.CommandSender;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005
006/**
007 * an interface to indicate that it is reloadable.
008 */
009public interface Reloadable {
010
011    /**
012     * Reloads this.
013     *
014     * @param sender the sender who executed reload
015     */
016    void reload(@NotNull CommandSender sender);
017
018}
